validation_result: pass (exit 0) for all four test scripts
evidence_summary: Scan caps default to 2500 for Codex rollouts, Claude sources, and summary-cache rows. Claude tail uses disk cache reuse so lowering cap does not erase cached entries. Codex detail still uses full findRolloutFiles.
risks: Threads beyond Codex scan cap or uncached Claude tail sources disappear from list until cap/cache allows; summary-cache truncation may hide older rows in cold-read cache. Constants are not yet VS Code settings (panel-view out of scope).
